mapper.sql: b.material_id as materialId, b.number as materialCode, b.name as materialName, b.specification as specification, d.name as useOrgId, b.use_org_id as useOrgKey, a.supplier_id as supplierId, c.number as supplierCode, c.name as supplierName, a.effective_date as effectiveDate, a.expiry_date as expiryDate, a.after_tax_price as afterTaxPrice, e.approve_date as approveDate

from erp_purchase_adjustment_line a inner join erp_purchase_adjustment e on e.id = a.p_id inner join erp_material b on b.material_id = a.material_id left join erp_supplier c on c.supplier_id = a.supplier_id left join erp_org d on d.org_id = b.use_org_id
mapper.select:
select count(1) from ( select a.material_id, a.supplier_id, b.use_org_id from erp_purchase_adjustment_line a inner join erp_purchase_adjustment e on e.id = a.p_id inner join erp_material b on b.material_id = a.material_id
group by a.material_id, a.supplier_id, b.use_org_id ) grouped

select a.material_id as materialId, a.supplier_id as supplierId, d.name as useOrgId, b.use_org_id as useOrgKey
group by a.material_id, a.supplier_id, b.use_org_id, d.name order by min(a.id) limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select
inner join (
select #{index} as ord, #{group.materialId} as material_id, #{group.supplierId} as supplier_id, #{group.useOrgKey} as use_org_id
) page_groups on page_groups.material_id = a.material_id and page_groups.supplier_id <=> a.supplier_id and page_groups.use_org_id <=> b.use_org_id
order by page_groups.ord, a.id
